home.emptyBody: Featured stories will appear here once they are published.
home.noArticlesBody: Use the admin dashboard to publish your first story and it will appear here.
home.magazineIntro: Our magazine brings you deep dives, photo essays, and insider analysis. Read stories that matter.
home.noMagazine: No magazine is available yet. Publish one from the dashboard to show it here.

about.heroTitle: Journalism that stays with the reader long after the headline.
about.heroBody: Vartmaan Sarokaar is a monthly publication by Vaanee Creations Pvt. Ltd. focused on depth, clarity, and public relevance. We aim to inform with rigor, inspire with ideas, and strengthen civic imagination through thoughtful editorial work.
about.missionBody: To publish work that helps readers understand the forces shaping public life.
about.audienceBody: Readers who value context, perspective, and substance over noise.
about.quote: We see publishing as a platform for dialogue, responsibility, and a more informed tomorrow.
about.whoWeAreTitle: Built for readers who want insight, not just information.
about.whoWeAreP1: Our editorial identity is rooted in relevance. We cover the pressing questions of politics, economy, society, culture, innovation, and leadership with a tone that is analytical, responsible, and accessible.
about.whoWeAreP2: A special part of our mission is to engage younger readers with stories that sharpen awareness and encourage participation in public life. Every issue is curated not only to document the moment, but to help readers think beyond it.
about.whoWeAreP3: We believe meaningful journalism should leave people clearer, more curious, and better equipped to interpret the world around them.
about.visionLead: To create a publication where public-interest journalism, thoughtful reflection, and future-facing ideas meet in one credible space.
about.visionBody: By blending knowledge with perspective, we want to encourage a generation of readers that is informed, responsible, and motivated to contribute to a better social future.
about.coverBody: We explore the systems, people, and ideas that influence how India thinks, changes, and moves forward.
about.pillar1Body: Sharp reporting on policy, governance, and national conversations that shape civic life.
about.pillar2Body: Stories that reflect the emotional, social, and cultural currents moving through India today.
about.pillar3Body: Profiles, essays, and forward-looking analysis that help readers imagine what comes next.
about.teamBody: The people shaping the voice, direction, and long-term vision of the publication.
about.publishedByTitle: Published by Vaanee Creations Pvt. Ltd.
about.publishedByBody: Our work is guided by a commitment to credible storytelling, editorial responsibility, and a long-term relationship with readers who care about substance.

magazine.title: Magazine
magazine.subtitle: Flip through our magazine online. Easy to read on any device.
magazine.emptyBody: No magazine yet. Publish one from the dashboard.
magazine.digitalSubscription: Read Magazine Online — Free for Everyone
magazine.digitalSubscriptionBody: All magazine issues available free. No subscription needed. Read on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop.
magazine.physicalSubscriptionBody: Premium quality printed magazine delivered to your home every month for ₹499. Includes free digital access.

newsDetail.lockedBody: This story is for our subscribers. Get free online access to read this and all stories.
newsDetail.sampleParagraphOne: The full story continues with more reporting, details, and expert views.
newsDetail.sampleParagraphTwo: This story connects local events to bigger changes in society, economy, and government.

sidebar.newsletterBody: Get the latest stories and magazine highlights every week. Join thousands of readers who trust us.

subscription.digitalActivated: Digital access is ready — all articles are free for everyone!
subscription.digitalSuccess: You now have digital access. Enjoy reading!
subscription.physicalSuccess: We received your payment proof. We will confirm your print order soon. Monthly recurring charge of ₹499.
subscription.unlockBody: Digital is free for all readers. Subscribe to print magazine for ₹499/month.
subscription.physicalCardBody: Subscribe to print magazine for ₹499/month. Monthly recurring billing. Upload payment proof to confirm.
subscription.clickToUpload: Click here to upload the proof
subscription.digitalNotePlaceholder: Add a note if you want (optional)...
subscription.info: Digital is free for all readers. Subscribe to print magazine for ₹499/month with free digital access included.

auth.digitalPitch: All articles and magazines are free to read online. Access everything on your phone, tablet, or computer. No credit card needed.
auth.physicalPitch: Subscribe to the printed magazine for ₹499/month. Includes free digital access. Monthly recurring billing.
auth.staffPasswordHint: Enter your staff email and password to access the admin panel.

auth.staffAccountsHint: Staff can sign in from the footer shortcuts.
auth.googleError: Unable to sign in with Google.

flipbook.digitalLabel: Free access to all magazine issues for everyone. Subscribe to print for ₹499/month.

admin.dashboardBody: Publish stories, upload magazines, manage readers, and run ads from here.
admin.newsFormBody: Publish a story. Add a photo, title, excerpt, and full story. You can gate it for premium readers.
admin.magazineFormBody: Upload a magazine issue. Add title, issue number, cover photo, and PDF pages. Set prices for online and print.
admin.pagesHint: One page image URL per line
admin.magazineHelper: Online reading can be free or require subscription. Print copies need payment proof before delivery.
admin.previewUntil: Preview until page {{page}} • Digital reading is free • Print magazine ₹499/month
admin.mediaBody: Upload article images, PDFs, audio, and reusable assets for stories and magazines.
admin.noMedia: No uploaded media yet. Use the upload button to create a reusable media library.
admin.adsBody: Edit sponsor creatives and destinations used in the sidebar.
admin.userRolesBody: Control who can access the admin panel and premium previews.
admin.settingsLineTwo: Auth routes are available at /api/auth/signup, /api/auth/login, and /api/auth/me.
admin.settingsLineThree: Protected uploads and media routes are available at /api/uploads and /api/media.
